description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- Allow agents to repair Reasonix config / 允许 Agent 修复 Reasonix 配置 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6159
- feat(creation): polish ContextWindowRing popover data by @Li-Charles-One in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6197
- chore(gitignore): ignore local temp/ scratch directories / 忽略本地 temp 临时目录 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6199
- fix(agent): unify sub-agent Options construction to stop config drift / 统一子代理 Options 构造点，修复配置漂移 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6198
- Explicit planner no-op contract and executor fallback on planner failure / 规划模型 no-op 显式合约与故障回退执行模型 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6193
- Fix escaped PowerShell file hooks / 修复 PowerShell 文件 hook 转义引号 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6200
- fix(skill): enforce review/security-review read-only contract at the tool boundary / 在工具边界强制 review/security-review 只读契约 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6202
- fix(agent): share child step-budget rule with parallel_tasks and keep read_skill at depth cap / 统一 parallel_tasks 子任务步数预算并在深度封顶时保留 read_skill by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6203
- Thread turn context into planner gate, trim handoff tool block, planner-attribute no-op conclusion / 规划门槛透传回合上下文、精简 handoff 工具块、no-op 结论归因规划模型 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6201
- Bump Go toolchain to 1.26.5 for stdlib vulnerability fixes / Go 工具链升至 1.26.5 修复标准库漏洞 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6206
- fix(desktop): skip blank topics whose session lease is foreign-held / 修复新建对话复用外部持锁的空白会话 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6208
- Keep compaction on failed planner-turn rollback; marker-only no-op contract / 规划回合失败回滚保留 compaction、no-op 判定仅认 marker by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6204
- fix(desktop): 弹出窗口失去焦点时不自动关闭 + 未保存编辑保护 by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6213
- fix(desktop): auto-send queued guidance when a turn ends naturally / 修复任务自然结束时排队消息丢失 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6215
- Guardian reviews use strictly alternating turns / guardian 评审改为严格交替的对话轮次 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6205
- Widen Windows node-eval statusline test timeout to 30s / 放宽 Windows node-eval statusline 测试超时至 30s by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6212
- fix(agent): clarify planner only has read-only tools to stop tool-worry loops (#6190) by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6214
- fix(desktop): prevent settings sidebar from flipping to horizontal tabs on narrow windows / 修复窄窗口下设置侧边栏突变为横向排列 by @HaoyueQin in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6019
- feat(acp): client fs/terminal integration, tool locations, plan updates, session modes / ACP 客户端 fs/终端集成、工具定位、plan 更新与会话模式 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6221
- Guard DeepSeek tool-call reasoning replay / 保护 DeepSeek 工具调用 reasoning 回放 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6217
- fix(desktop): respect manual transcript scrolling by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6220
- feat(creation): Windows 平台标题栏元素垂直对齐 by @Li-Charles-One in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6207
- fix(desktop): 输入框右键编辑菜单（剪切/复制/粘贴/全选，含快捷键提示） by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6219
- Update website install options / 更新官网安装入口 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6240
- Disable Windows Bash sandbox in stable config / 在 Windows 配置中禁用 Bash 沙箱 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6230
- Update acknowledgments contributors / 更新致谢贡献者 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6243
- feat(creation): 统一右侧面板与 Windows 控制框背景色 by @Li-Charles-One in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/6244
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.17.8...desktop-v1.17.9
